g.text: **Single Entry Point** The Engine class provides a unified API following the principle: "Make simple things simple, complex things possible"
**Zero-Copy Interface** NumPy arrays passed directly to C++ without copying via pybind11 buffer protocol
**Single Source of Truth** Unified config covering signal, pipeline, execution, and performance parameters
**RSE/RE Standards** Research Software Engineering compliant benchmark framework with reproducibility guarantees
**Benchmark Stability** Reduces CV by 50-75% via GPU clock locking

div.p: v2.0 Extensibility Prepared for pluggable processing stages in future releases

text.tspan: {static} + assert_spectral_peak(spectrum, freq, sr, nfft, tol): void
